popup.webAppMessage: Our Web Application will be available soon in Croatian, German, and English! You will be able to manage your care plans and track grave maintenance directly from your browser.
hero.title: Grave care, |at any distance.
hero.subtitle: Oaza Mira connects families with **local florists and caretakers** who maintain the grave of your loved ones — they bring flowers, clean, and light candles. After each visit, you **receive photos**, wherever you are.
howitworks.title: Simple Care. Lasting Peace of Mind.
howitworks.subtitle: See how Oaza Mira makes it easy to ensure your loved ones' graves are cared for – no matter where you are in the world.
howitworks.steps.subtitle: Getting started is simple. Follow a few clear steps to ensure ongoing, reliable care.
howitworks.step1.title: Register the grave
howitworks.step1.desc: Add the grave of your loved one to the Oaza Mira system.
howitworks.step2.title: Choose a service
howitworks.step2.desc: Flowers, cleaning, candles or special care — you choose.
howitworks.step3.title: Confirm order
howitworks.step3.desc: Review and confirm your service request.
howitworks.step4.title: Receive photo proof
howitworks.step4.desc: Photos arrive as soon as the order is completed.
howitworks.features.subtitle: We've built a platform that prioritizes trust, transparency, and compassion.
howitworks.feature1.title: Verified Caretakers
howitworks.feature1.desc: Every caretaker in our network is verified, ensuring trust and reliability.
howitworks.feature2.title: Fresh Floral Arrangements
howitworks.feature2.desc: Seasonal flowers and decorations to keep the resting place beautiful year-round.
howitworks.feature3.title: Photo Documentation
howitworks.feature3.desc: Visual proof after every visit – transparency you can trust.
howitworks.feature4.title: Real-Time Notifications
howitworks.feature4.desc: Get instant updates when care is completed or if any action is needed.
howitworks.feature5.title: Family Collaboration
howitworks.feature5.desc: Invite family members to view and contribute to the care together.
howitworks.feature6.title: Compassionate Support
howitworks.feature6.desc: Our team is here to help whenever you need assistance.
howitworks.testimonials.title: Families Trust Oaza Mira
howitworks.testimonials.subtitle: See what families around Europe have to say about their experience.
howitworks.testimonial1: Living in Vienna while my mother's grave is in Croatia used to worry me constantly. Now I receive photos every month and have peace of mind.
howitworks.testimonial2: The photo proof feature is incredible. I finally know that my father's grave is being well-maintained, even from 800km away.
howitworks.testimonial3: We use Oaza Mira as a family. My siblings in Canada and I share the cost and the care. It's brought us closer together.
howitworks.cta.title: Ready to Begin?
howitworks.cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of families who trust Oaza Mira to care for their loved ones.
plans.title: Reliable Care-Plans via our Members Portal.
plans.subtitle: Our verified network of caretakers ensures monthly upkeep, floral arrangements, and photo proof for complete transparency.

privacy-policy.2h4v5g: We use carefully selected providers for hosting, email delivery, analytics and marketing. They process data only on our behalf and under our instructions. Data transfers to other countries occur only if adequate protection exists or appropriate safeguards are in place. Transfers to US providers (e.g., Google LLC, Meta Platforms Inc., SendGrid, Mailchimp) occur only if certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework or based on EU Standard Contractual Clauses.
privacy-policy.n7kh4j: Our website uses only technically necessary cookies. If analytics or marketing cookies are used, we will ask for your consent first. You can withdraw your consent at any time via cookie settings.
privacy-policy.ls2tnc: Personal data is kept only as long as necessary for the respective purpose or as required by law.
privacy-policy.ow8rze: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict processing, data portability, object to processing and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, send an e-mail to contact@oaza-mira.app. You may also contact the competent data protection authority in Florida, United States, or your country of residence.
privacy-policy.ytl33c: We protect personal data through technical and organizational measures against loss, misuse and unauthorized access (e.g. SSL encryption, access restrictions, regular backups).

Should we become aware of any violations, such links will be removed immediately.We also assume no liability for content, statements, or actions of third parties – including caretakers, florists, partner businesses, or any other partners listed or connected through Oaza Mira. Responsibility lies solely with the respective partner.
disclaimer-page.aa0fux: Oaza Mira operates solely as a digital mediation platform. The actual execution of services (e.g., grave care, delivery, decoration, or cleaning work) is the sole responsibility of the respective caretakers engaged by users. OAZA MIRA LLC, as the operator of Oaza Mira, is not liable for errors in execution, non-performance, quality issues, or any other damages resulting from cooperation with external partners. Legal relationships exist exclusively between the user and the caretaker.

business.hero.desc: Pay tribute to deceased colleagues and support the families of your employees with grave care — flowers, cleaning, and maintenance at any distance, with clear photo proof.

business.steps.s4.title: Receive photo proof

business.split1.desc: Show that your company cares beyond the workplace. Pay tribute to deceased colleagues or support the families of your employees with grave care — from flowers to regular maintenance, all with clear photo proof.
business.split2.desc: Whether it's one grave or several, your company manages all orders, flowers, and cleaning from a single dashboard — clear communication, verified work, all in one place.
business.cta.desc: Pay tribute to colleagues and support the families of your employees — wherever they rest, your care reaches them.
institutions.hero.desc: Care for graves of public importance — athletes, politicians, presidents, and other prominent figures — with flowers, cleaning, and regular maintenance, all transparently and with clear photo proof.

institutions.split1.desc: Athletes, politicians, presidents, and other prominent figures — their resting places deserve dignified, regular care. Your institution can provide flowers, cleaning, and maintenance for such graves, all with clear photo proof.
institutions.split2.desc: Whether it is individual graves or a complete register, your institution manages all orders, flowers, and maintenance from a single dashboard — transparent, documented, and clear.
institutions.cta.desc: Ensure that resting places of public importance are always landscaped and respectfully maintained — easily, transparently, and with clear photo proof.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.c1t.p2: Address: 3834 Powerline Road, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33309, USA (principal office) / Mailing address: 261 North University Drive, Suite 500, Plantation, FL 33324, USA
privacy.c2t.p1: As OAZA MIRA LLC is established outside the European Union and processes the personal data of EU citizens, we have appointed the following representative in accordance with Article 27 of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
privacy.c2t.p2: Organisation: AEON – Vereinigung für Bildung und Organisation der Verbindung zwischen den Generationen Address: Schönbrunner Straße 35/Top 4, 1050 Vienna, Austria ZVR number: 1568721336
privacy.c3t.p1: 3.1 Account DataName, email address, and access data provided during registration.
privacy.c3t.p2: 3.2 Payment DataPayment information is processed by our payment provider Stripe. We do not store any credit card data on our servers.
privacy.c3t.p3: 3.3 Order DataInformation about your bookings, including grave location, service type, and communication with care providers.
privacy.c3t.p4: 3.4 Usage DataIP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, and general interaction data collected by analytics tools including Google Analytics.
privacy.c3t.p5: 3.5 Communication DataInformation you provide when contacting us or subscribing to our newsletter.
privacy.c4t.p1: Contract Fulfillment (Art. 6 (1) (b) GDPR): Processing your bookings, account management, payment processing, facilitating communication between customers and care providers.
privacy.c4t.p2: Legitimate Interest (Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR): Improving our platform, analytics, fraud prevention, quality assurance (Proof of Care verification).
privacy.c4t.p3: Consent (Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR): Marketing communication, newsletter, marketing cookies. You can revoke your consent at any time.
privacy.c4t.p4: Legal Obligation (Art. 6 (1) (c) GDPR): Tax retention, legal compliance, responding to lawful requests.
privacy.c5t.p1: We share personal data with the following categories of recipients to the extent necessary for the operation of our platform:
privacy.c5t.p2: Data is shared only to the extent necessary for the specific purpose. All processors are contractually bound to handle data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.c6t: Important: Our servers and primary data processing operations are located in the United States. OAZA MIRA LLC is not certified under the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework. By using our platform, you acknowledge that your personal data is transferred to and processed in the United States. We implement appropriate safeguards, including Standard Contractual Clauses, where applicable, to protect your data during such transfers.
privacy.c7t: We retain personal data for as long as your account is active or as necessary to provide our services. Upon termination of your account, we retain data in accordance with applicable tax and commercial legal obligations or as necessary to resolve disputes. Data processed for marketing purposes is kept until you withdraw your consent.
privacy.c8t.p1: If you are located within the European Union, you have the following rights under the GDPR:
privacy.c8t.p2: To exercise your rights, please contact us at contact@oaza-mira.app. We will respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority in the EU Member State of your residence.
privacy.c9t: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we process your email address on the basis of your consent. You may unsubscribe at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in the email or by contacting us.
privacy.c10t: Detailed information about our use of cookies can be found in our Cookie Policy.
privacy.c11t: We use industry-standard technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, loss or alteration. Payment data is processed exclusively through certified PCI-DSS providers.
privacy.c12t: Our platform is not intended for persons under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors.
privacy.c13t: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be published on the platform with an updated effective date. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the amended Privacy Policy.
privacy.c14t: For all privacy-related inquiries:Email: contact@oaza-mira.appEU Representative: AEON, Schönbrunner Straße 35/Top 4, 1050 Wien, Österreich
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.c1t: By accessing or using the Oaza Mira platform (www.oaza-mira.app), operated by OAZA MIRA LLC (“we”, “us” or the “Platform”), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Platform.
terms.c2t.p1: Oaza Mira is a digital intermediary platform that connects users (“Users”) with independent local service providers (“Service Providers”) for the maintenance of graves and monuments. The Platform facilitates the booking, communication, payment and quality-assurance processes between Users and Service Providers.
terms.c2t.p2: Important: OAZA MIRA LLC acts solely as an intermediary. We do not provide the physical maintenance services ourselves. All maintenance services are provided by independent contractors who are solely responsible for the quality and performance of their work.
terms.c3t: To use the Platform you must create an account and provide accurate, complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. You must be at least 18 years old to open an account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.c4t.p1: The Platform facilitates the booking of grave and monument maintenance services, including but not limited to grave cleaning, placing flowers, lighting candles and related maintenance services.
terms.c4t.p2: After an order is submitted, the request is forwarded to registered Service Providers in the relevant area. Service Providers may accept or decline orders at their own discretion. The Platform does not guarantee the availability of Service Providers or the acceptance of any particular order.
terms.c4t.p3: Standard orders should be completed within 72 business hours. Scheduled orders must be carried out on the requested date. These timeframes are subject to the availability of Service Providers and local conditions.
terms.c5t: Upon completion, Service Providers upload “before and after” photographs with GPS metadata and timestamps (“Proof of Care”) for quality assurance. Users have 48 hours to review the work in order to confirm the service or raise a complaint. If no complaint is submitted within 48 hours, the service is deemed accepted (tacit approval). This does not affect the consumer’s non-waivable statutory rights in respect of defective performance.
terms.c6t.p1: The Platform charges a service fee of up to 25% of the total order value. This fee covers the operation of the Platform, customer acquisition, payment processing, quality assurance, dispute resolution and administrative infrastructure.
terms.c6t.p2: All payments are securely processed via Stripe. By submitting an order, you authorise the charge of the full order amount. Payment is held until the service is completed and verified.
terms.c6t.p3: The Platform offers booking options by subscription. Subscription fees are charged in advance, at the start of each billing period (monthly or annually, depending on the selected care plan). Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled before renewal.
terms.c7t: All payments are non-refundable. Account credits may be issued at our discretion for deficient services. Cash refunds are not granted. For full details, please refer to our Refund Policy.
terms.c8: 8. Role and Liability of the Platform
terms.c8t.p1: OAZA MIRA LLC acts solely as a digital intermediary. No employment, agency or partnership relationship exists between the Platform and any Service Provider. The Platform is not responsible for the acts, omissions or conduct of Service Providers.
terms.c8t.p2: Nothing in this section excludes or limits our liability to the extent that such exclusion or limitation is not permitted by the mandatory consumer protection law of the country in which the consumer is habitually resident (including liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence and for intent or gross negligence).
terms.c9t.li2: Use the Platform only for its intended purpose
terms.c9t.li3: Not attempt to circumvent the Platform in order to engage Service Providers directly
terms.c9t.li4: Not upload any harmful, unlawful or inappropriate content
terms.c9t.li5: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
terms.c10t: All content on the Platform, including text, graphics, logos and software, is owned by OAZA MIRA LLC. By uploading content (including photographs), you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free licence to use, display and distribute such content in connection with the operation of the Platform.
terms.c11t: Your use of the Platform is subject to our Privacy Policy, which describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data.
terms.c12t: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Platform at any time, with or without cause, and with or without prior notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Platform ceases immediately. Termination does not affect amounts already paid for services not yet performed, nor your non-waivable statutory consumer rights.
terms.c13t: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, United States of America. All disputes arising from or related to these Terms are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.
terms.c14t: Before initiating legal action, you agree to first contact us at contact@oaza-mira.app and attempt to resolve the dispute informally. If the dispute cannot be resolved within 30 days, either party may pursue legal action in accordance with Section 13.
terms.c15t: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
terms.c16t: We reserve the right to amend these Terms at any time. Changes will be published on the Platform with an updated effective date. Continued use of the Platform after the changes constitutes acceptance of the amended Terms.
cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.c1t: This Cookie Policy explains how OAZA MIRA LLC ("we", "us", or "our") uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website www.oaza-mira.app (the "Platform"). By continuing to use the Platform, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this Policy.
cookie.c2t: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us to provide, improve, and secure our services. Cookies can be "session cookies" (deleted when the browser is closed) or "persistent cookies" (remain on your device for a specific period).
cookie.c3t.p1: 3.1 Strictly Necessary CookiesThese cookies are essential for the proper functioning of the Platform. They enable core functionalities such as user authentication, session management, and security. These cookies cannot be disabled.
cookie.c3t.p2: 3.2 Analytics CookiesWe use analytics tools, including Google Analytics, to understand how visitors interact with our Platform. These cookies collect information such as visited pages, time spent on the Platform, and general usage patterns. This data helps us improve our services.
cookie.c3t.p3: 3.3 Marketing CookiesWe may use marketing cookies to display relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns. These cookies may track your browsing activity across different websites.
cookie.c3t.p4: 3.4 Third-Party CookiesSome cookies may be set by third-party providers that we use to operate and improve our Platform. These third parties have their own privacy policies regarding their use of cookies.
cookie.c4t.p1: When you visit our Platform for the first time, a cookie consent banner will be displayed, allowing you to accept cookies or manage your cookie preferences. You can adjust your preferences at any time via the cookie settings on our Platform.
cookie.c4t.p2: Note: Strictly necessary cookies do not require consent as they are essential for the functionality of the Platform.
cookie.c5t: You can manage or delete cookies via your browser settings. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the Platform. Further information on managing cookies can be found in your browser's help documentation.
cookie.c6t: Data collected through cookies may be processed and stored on servers in the United States. For more information on how we handle your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
cookie.c7t: We reserve the right to update this Cookie Policy at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting on the Platform. We encourage you to review this Policy regularly.
cookie.c8t.p1: If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact us at:
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.c1t: This Refund Policy applies to all services booked via the Oaza Mira platform (www.oaza-mira.app), operated by OAZA MIRA LLC. By placing an order on our platform, you agree to the conditions set forth in this policy.
refund.c2t.p1: Oaza Mira acts as a digital intermediary platform connecting customers with independent care providers for memorial and grave care services. Upon placing an order, the request is immediately forwarded to a care provider for assignment and execution.
refund.c2t.p2: Important: Due to the immediate assignment of orders to independent providers, all bookings are considered final once confirmed. The service execution process begins immediately upon order placement.
refund.c3t: All payments made via the platform are non-refundable. We do not provide cash refunds, bank transfers, or credit card chargebacks under any circumstances. This applies to both individual bookings and subscription payments.
refund.c4t: In cases where a service was not provided or was provided in a significantly deficient manner (as determined solely by Oaza Mira based on Proof of Care verification), we may, at our sole discretion, issue an account credit to your Oaza Mira account. Account credits:
refund.c5t.p1: 5.1 GeneralBy placing an order on the platform, you acknowledge and accept that the ordered service is immediately forwarded to an independent provider for execution. Given the nature of the service as an intermediated, real-world service provided by third parties, the right of withdrawal does not apply once the order has been confirmed and assigned.
refund.c5t.p2: 5.2 EU CustomersFor customers within the European Union: By confirming your order, you explicitly consent to the immediate execution of the service and acknowledge that you lose your right of withdrawal pursuant to Article 16(a) of the EU Consumer Rights Directive (2011/83/EU) once the service has been fully performed. For services not yet fully performed, you explicitly request that execution begins before the expiration of the 14-day withdrawal period and acknowledge the resulting loss of your right of withdrawal.
refund.c5t.p3: 5.3 SubscriptionsSubscription services can be canceled at any time for future billing periods. No refunds or credits are granted for the current billing period. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
refund.c6t: If you are unsatisfied with a service, you may file a complaint within 48 hours of service delivery (evidenced by the uploaded Proof of Care). Complaints will be reviewed based on the submitted documentation. If a complaint is deemed justified, an account credit may be issued at our discretion.
refund.c7t: All payments are processed securely via Stripe. OAZA MIRA LLC does not store credit card or bank details. For questions regarding payment processing, please contact us at contact@oaza-mira.app.
refund.c8t: Initiating a chargeback or payment dispute without prior contact via the standard complaint procedure may result in the suspension or termination of your account. We reserve the right to pursue all available legal remedies for fraudulent chargebacks.
refund.c9t: This Refund Policy is governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States of America. All disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.
refund.c10t.p1: For questions regarding this policy, please contact us at:
privacy.c5t.li2: GoHighLevel – customer relationship management and communication
privacy.c5t.li4: Google / Firebase (Google LLC) – hosting, database, authentication, photo storage (Proof of Care) and push notifications
privacy.c8t.li1: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR) – request information about your processed data
privacy.c8t.li2: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR) – correction of inaccurate data
privacy.c8t.li3: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR) – request deletion of your data
privacy.c8t.li4: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR) – restrict the processing of your data
privacy.c8t.li5: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR) – receive your data in a portable format
privacy.c8t.li6: Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR) – object to processing based on legitimate interests
privacy.c8t.li7: Right to withdraw consent (Art. 7(3) GDPR) – withdraw your consent at any time
refund.c4t.li1: Can be used for future bookings on the platform
refund.c4t.li2: Are non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash
refund.c4t.li3: Cannot be withdrawn or paid out
refund.c4t.li4: Have no expiration date as long as your account remains active
home.steps.subtitle: Three steps separate you from the peace of mind that the grave is cared for.
home.steps.step1.title: You Order
home.steps.step1.desc: Choose a grave and service — flowers, cleaning, or candles — through the app.
home.steps.step2.title: Local Partner Cares
home.steps.step2.desc: A verified florist or caretaker from that location takes over and does the work.
home.steps.step3.title: You Receive Proof
home.steps.step3.desc: Before-and-after photos arrive on your phone, wherever you are.
home.mediator.desc: Oaza Mira does not maintain graves directly. We connect you with verified local florists and caretakers — those who already know your cemetery — and ensure that every step is clear, agreed upon, and documented.
home.mediator.feature1.title: Verified Partners
home.mediator.feature1.desc: Every florist and caretaker goes through verification before joining the network.
home.mediator.feature2.title: Photo Proof After Each Visit
home.mediator.feature2.desc: See the actual results — before and after photos.
home.mediator.feature3.title: Secure & Transparent Payment
home.mediator.feature3.desc: Pay safely through the app, with zero cash and complete clarity.
home.roles.subtitle: Whether you are looking for care or providing it — here is your place.
home.roles.role1.title: For Families
home.roles.role1.desc: Care for the resting place of your loved ones from anywhere in the world — with photo proof after each visit.
home.roles.role2.title: Florists & Caretakers
home.roles.role2.desc: Receive regular orders from your local area without marketing — and build your reputation with verified work.
home.roles.role3.title: For Businesses
home.roles.role3.desc: Florists and municipal services — expand your reach and manage orders all in one place.
home.roles.role4.title: For Institutions
home.roles.role4.desc: Cemeteries and administrations — digitalize grave care and offer the service to families.
home.cta.title: Join hundreds of families who trust Oaza Mira.
home.cta.desc: Join hundreds of families who trust Oaza Mira to care for their loved ones.
howitworks.slider.desc: From the moment you order to the photos after the visit — everything is clearly visible. No ambiguities, no waiting in uncertainty. You know who is caring for the grave, when, and how.
about.sincerity.title: Honestly about who we are
about.sincerity.desc: We believe honesty is the foundation of trust — so let's be clear.
about.sincerity.do.title: What we are
about.sincerity.do.item1: A platform that connects families with local partners.
about.sincerity.do.item2: A system that verifies and documents every service.
about.sincerity.do.item3: An intermediary with clear, transparent payment.
about.sincerity.dont.title: What we are not
about.sincerity.dont.item1: We do not care for graves ourselves — verified local partners do that.
about.sincerity.dont.item2: We do not employ caretakers directly — services are performed by local partners.
about.sincerity.dont.item3: We are not a municipal utility or direct cemetery caretakers.
privacy.c3t.s1_desc: Name, email address and login credentials provided during registration.
privacy.c3t.s2_desc: Payment information is processed by our partner Stripe. We do not store credit card details on our servers.
privacy.c3t.s3_desc: Information about your bookings, including the grave location, type of service and communication with service providers.
privacy.c3t.s4_desc: IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited and general interaction data collected by analytics tools, including Google Analytics.
privacy.c3t.s5_desc: Information you provide when contacting us or subscribing to our newsletter.
privacy.c3t.s6_desc: “Before and after” photographs of the grave site uploaded by service providers as proof that the service has been performed and for quality assurance. These photographs may show headstone inscriptions, monuments and their immediate surroundings.
privacy.c3t.s7_desc: Geolocation metadata (GPS coordinates) associated with Proof of Care photographs and the grave site location, which we use to verify that the service was carried out at the correct location.
privacy.c3t.s8_desc: We collect your phone number for identity verification by one-time password (OTP), account protection and order-related communication.
privacy.c3t.s9_desc: Information you enter about the grave site and the deceased person (e.g. name and inscription on the monument, name and location of the cemetery, grave plot reference) that is necessary to perform the ordered service.
privacy.c4t.li1: Performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): processing your bookings, managing your account, processing payments, enabling communication between customers and service providers.
privacy.c4t.li2: Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR): improving our platform, analytics, fraud prevention, quality assurance (Proof of Care verification).
privacy.c4t.li3: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR): marketing communication, newsletter, marketing cookies. You may withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.c4t.li4: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR): tax retention, legal compliance, responding to lawful requests.
privacy.c4t.p5: We carry out phone number verification by one-time password (OTP) and the processing of Proof of Care photographs and GPS data for the performance of the contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) and for our legitimate interest in quality assurance and fraud prevention (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
privacy.c5t.li5: Resend – delivery of transactional and system emails
privacy.c5t.li6: WhatsApp / Meta Platforms – user communication via WhatsApp messages
privacy.c6t.p1: Important: Our servers and primary data processing operations are located in the USA. OAZA MIRA LLC is not certified under the EU–US Data Privacy Framework. By using our platform, you acknowledge that your personal data is transferred to and processed in the USA. We apply appropriate safeguards, including Standard Contractual Clauses where applicable, to protect your data during such transfers.
privacy.c6t.p2: These transfers to the USA also include photographs (Proof of Care), GPS location data and phone numbers, as they are processed via providers based in the USA (e.g. Google/Firebase, Resend, Meta). Standard Contractual Clauses and appropriate safeguards likewise apply to these categories of data.
privacy.c14t.p3: EU Representative: AEON, Schönbrunner Straße 35/Top 4, 1050 Vienna, Austria
terms.c6t.p4: Cancellation: You may cancel your subscription at any time directly in the app via the path: Profile → My Care Plans → select plan → Cancel subscription. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period, and you retain access to the plan’s services until then. This does not affect your consumer rights under Section 7.
terms.c7t.p1: Right of withdrawal for EU consumers (14 days). If you are a consumer habitually resident in the European Union, you have the right to withdraw from a distance contract within 14 days, without giving any reason, in accordance with Directive 2011/83/EU on consumer rights and our Refund Policy.
terms.c7t.p2: Performed services (Art. 16(a) of Directive 2011/83/EU). As maintenance services are often performed quickly (typically within 72 hours), when placing an order you expressly request that performance of the service begin immediately and acknowledge that you will lose your right of withdrawal once the service has been fully performed. If you withdraw before full performance, you must pay a proportionate amount for the services already provided, and the remainder is refunded to you.
terms.c7t.p3: Defective services. For services not performed in accordance with the order, we may, at our discretion or in accordance with your statutory rights, issue a refund or account credit. This provision does not affect your non-waivable statutory consumer rights (e.g. rights arising from material defects). For full details, please see our Refund Policy.
terms.c13t.p1: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, United States of America. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Fort Lauderdale, Florida.
terms.c13t.p2: Exception for EU/Croatian consumers. If you are a consumer habitually resident in the European Union, the above choice of law cannot deprive you of the protection afforded to you by the mandatory consumer protection provisions of the country of your habitual residence (Art. 6 of Regulation (EC) No 593/2008 — “Rome I”). Notwithstanding the choice of the law of the State of Florida, you retain all non-waivable consumer rights under the law of your country of residence, and nothing in these Terms limits or excludes those rights.
terms.c13t.p3: Furthermore, as a consumer resident in the EU, pursuant to Articles 17–19 of Regulation (EU) No 1215/2012 (“Brussels I bis”), you have the right to bring proceedings before the courts of your country of habitual residence and may be sued only before those courts. The above provision on the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Fort Lauderdale does not apply to the extent that it would conflict with those mandatory provisions.
terms.c14t.p1: Before initiating legal proceedings, you agree to first contact us at contact@oaza-mira.app and attempt to resolve the dispute informally. If the dispute cannot be resolved within 30 days, either party may initiate legal proceedings in accordance with Section 13.
terms.c14t.p2: For consumers habitually resident in the European Union, alternative dispute resolution (ADR) before the competent national bodies is also available. For consumers in Croatia these include, among others, the Mediation Centre and Court of Honour at the Croatian Chamber of Economy (Rooseveltov trg 2, 10000 Zagreb, www.hgk.hr) and the Mediation Centre and Court of Honour at the Croatian Chamber of Trades and Crafts (www.hok.hr). This provision does not affect the consumer’s right to refer the matter to the competent court or consumer protection authority in their country of residence.
